changes: Established data/cities-source.json as single source of truth (150 cities × 39 raw fields)
Created export pipeline (data/scripts/export.mjs) to compute 11 derived fields
Fixed confidence fields: safetyConfidence, freedomConfidence converted from string to numeric (0-100)
Created field registry (data/registry.json) with complete metadata for all 49+ fields
Moved raw source data from _archive/data_sources/ to data/sources/
Composite indices verified: safety, healthcare, governance, freedom all recomputed from raw data
